title: On cards, AI as core subject in Punjab schools
description: The Education Department is all set to introduce artificial intelligence (AI) as a core subject in schools during the current academic session.
content:
The Education Department is all set to introduce artificial intelligence (AI) as a core subject in schools during the current academic session.

title: AI is a gold mine for spammers and scammers, but Google is using it as a tool to fight back
description: From an advertisement for an herbal remedy that promises to cure all to a video featuring a voice that sounds just like a movie star, you’ve surely encountered spam and scam advertisements online. title: Faith leaders call on Congress to minimize usage of AI weapons

content:

title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei arrives at White House for talks

title: AI demand is inflated
description: The main usage metric for artificial intelligence, called tokens, looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated.
content:
The main demand signal for artificial intelligence looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated. Anthropic, by pricing its tools for that reality, might be the best-positioned AI company if a correction comes.
